_meta.name: Sporeus — Errors
_meta.description: Top error classes, RLS denials, Anthropic API errors, storage quota, cold-start spikes.
_meta.import_instructions: Axiom → Dashboards → New → Import JSON → paste this file

charts.title: Top 20 error classes last 24h
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where status == "error" | summarize count() by fn, error_class | sort by count_ desc | take 20

charts.title: Error rate over time by function (5-min buckets)
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where status == "error" | summarize errors = count() by bin(_time, 5m), fn | sort by _time desc

charts.title: RLS permission denials per minute (alert >20/min)
charts.apl: ['sporeus-prod'] | where event_message contains "permission denied" | summarize denials = count() by bin(_time, 1m) | where denials > 5

charts.title: Anthropic API errors (429 / overloaded / model errors)
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where fn in ("ai-proxy", "analyse-session", "ai-batch-worker") | where status == "error" | where error_class contains "Anthropic" or error_msg contains "429" or error_msg contains "overloaded" | summarize count() by bin(_time, 5m), fn, error_class

charts.title: Storage quota warnings (Supabase log drain)
charts.apl: ['sporeus-prod'] | where event_message contains "storage" and event_message contains "quota" | summarize count() by bin(_time, 1h)

charts.title: Cold-start / timeout spikes (duration > 10s, > 3 per 5 min)
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where duration_ms > 10000 | summarize slow_calls = count() by bin(_time, 5m), fn | where slow_calls > 3

charts.title: FIT/GPX parse failures (SLO S-3: success rate > 95%)
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where fn == "parse-activity" | summarize total = count(), errors = countif(status == "error") by bin(_time, 1h) | extend fail_pct = round(errors * 100.0 / total, 2) | sort by _time desc

charts.title: Total errors last 24h
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where _time >= ago(24h) | where status == "error" | summarize count()
